ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "start_at_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the campaign starts */,
  "end_at_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the campaign ends */,
  "daily_cap" INTEGER /* Daily budget cap for the campaign */,
  "advertiser_id" TEXT /* ID of the advertiser who created the campaign */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the campaign (e.g., 1 = high, 2 = medium, 3 = low) */,
  "ptr" REAL /* Probability of the campaign being displayed (from 0 to 1) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the campaign */,
  "spend" REAL /* Amount spent so far in the campaign */,
  "campaign_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_campaign_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_type_id") REFERENCES campaign_types ("campaign_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advertiser */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the advertiser */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the advertiser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertiser account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertiser account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_types" (
  "campaign_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign type */,
  "campaign_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targeting_options" (
  "targeting_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting option */,
  "targeting_option_name" TEXT /* Name of the targeting option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the targeting option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targeting_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targeting" (
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign */,
  "targeting_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the targeting option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "targeting_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., advertiser, campaign manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign being clicked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who clicked */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was clicked */,
  "click_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to click the campaign */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who clicked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the click event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion event */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign that led to the conversion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who converted */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion occurred */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., purchase, sign-up) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the conversion (e.g., amount of a purchase) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to convert */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who converted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roi" (
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI event */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign that generated the ROI */,
  "roi_date" TEXT /* Date when the ROI was calculated */,
  "roi_value" REAL /* Value of the ROI (e.g., revenue, profit) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the campaign */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit calculated from the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ROI was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
